settings.heading: Microbiome Support for Real-Life Needs
settings.text: Understanding the microbiome is key for health. Our program promotes gut health, digestion, and immunity. With probiotics and prebiotics, we create balance in your gut for better well-being. Whether facing digestive issues or enhancing health, our solutions can help you thrive.

settings.heading: Why Most Probiotics Don't Work
settings.text: The probiotic aisle is crowded with capsules promising billions of bacteria. But your microbiome isn't a numbers game. Your gut is a complex ecosystem.

settings.title: Biomsify® Fermentation
settings.text: Beneficial microbes are cultivated using a proprietary fermentation approach designed to mimic aspects of the gut environment.

settings.title: TriBIOM® Ecosystem Design
settings.text: Each Biom formula combines: Beneficial microbes, Microbial nutrients, Postbiotic metabolites a complete system, not just a capsule.

settings.title: Microbiome Systems Approach
settings.text: Instead of delivering isolated bacteria, Biom formulations are designed to support the full microbial ecosystem in your gut.

settings.heading: Built on Microbiome Science
settings.text: Biom products are designed using a microbiome systems approach - combining microbes, microbial nutrients, and microbial metabolites.

settings.name: Sarah
settings.quote: If you're on a GLP-1 medication, you know the gut side effects can be tough. This is LeanBiom Gut Support. It's a game changer for easing those issues and helps with appetite control. With its prebiotics, probiotics, and postbiotics, it's honestly a must-try.

settings.name: Catherin
settings.quote: It's Biom Probiotics® with unique TriBiom technology. It combines probiotics, prebiotics, and immunobiotics to seriously boost your gut immunity and diversify your microbiome for optimal gut health.

settings.name: Theresa
settings.quote: Tired of feeling off? This Biom Probiotics® is a game changer. It's packed with 10 billion flora for optimal gut health. Plus, the polyphenolic prebiotics and natural cranberry and pomegranate extracts give you that amazing feminine support.

settings.heading: Trusted by Thousands of Customers Across the U.S.

settings.card_text: LeanBiom’s proprietary formula is the first to combine nine clinically studied ‘lean bacteria’ strains with Diversify® a soluble + insoluble lean fiber enhanced with patented LiveBiom Patented technology for improved absorption.

settings.heading: Your Microbiome Is an Ecosystem. Support It Like One.
settings.text: Made for every woman that's endlessly searched for answers. Developed with medical experts and validated through independent clinical studies, because it's what we deserve.
